creator: beech@FreeBSD.org
text:
Patch does not apply. Please make sure your diff is against the current port 
in the tree.

maximum3# patch <pr-patch
Hmm...  Looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|
|
|diff -ruN sit.old/Makefile sit/Makefile
|--- sit.old/Makefile    2011-04-16 20:01:43.000000000 +0200
|+++ sit/Makefile        2011-04-17 13:42:24.000000000 +0200
--------------------------
Patching file Makefile using Plan A...
Hunk #1 failed at 6.
1 out of 1 hunks failed--saving rejects to Makefile.rej
Hmm...  The next patch looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|diff -ruN sit.old/distinfo sit/distinfo                                                                                                                                                                                                      
|--- sit.old/distinfo    2011-04-16 20:01:43.000000000 +0200                                                                                                                                                                                  
|+++ sit/distinfo        2011-04-17 13:43:11.000000000 +0200                                                                                                                                                                                  
--------------------------
Patching file sit/distinfo using Plan A...
Hunk #1 succeeded at 1 with fuzz 1.
Hmm...  The next patch looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|diff -ruN sit.old/pkg-plist sit/pkg-plist                                                                                                                                                                                                    
|--- sit.old/pkg-plist   2011-04-16 20:01:43.000000000 +0200                                                                                                                                                                                  
|+++ sit/pkg-plist       2011-04-16 20:37:46.000000000 +0200                                                                                                                                                                                  
--------------------------
Patching file sit/pkg-plist using Plan A...
Hunk #1 failed at 208.
Hunk #2 succeeded at 322.
Hunk #3 succeeded at 332.
Hunk #4 succeeded at 373.
Hunk #5 succeeded at 1046.
Hunk #6 succeeded at 2064.
Hunk #7 succeeded at 2093.
1 out of 7 hunks failed--saving rejects to sit/pkg-plist.rej
Hmm...  Ignoring the trailing garbage.
done
